page_content:
Corequisite: EDSP490.

Jointly offered with: EDSP695.

Restriction: Must be in Special Education program; or must be in one of the following programs (Special Education (Doctoral); Special Education (Master's)).

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP495 or EDSP695.

EDSP498 Special Problems in Special Education (1-6 Credits)

Available only to education majors who have definite plans for individual study of approved problems. Credit according to extent of work. Prerequisite: Available only to education majors who have definite plans for individual study of approved problems.
